chapter_title: About Veiling the Defects of the Muslims

hadith_entries.text:
149. Narrated Abu-Huraira : 'I heard Allah's
Messenger saying: "The sins of my followers will be
forgiven, except those of the Mojahiroon (those people who
tell people about their evil deeds, that the people had not
known about previously). An example of such a disclosure
is if a person commits a sin at night and Allah screens it
from people. Then, he comes in the morning and say; 'O so-
and-so! I did such-and-such (evil) deed last night,' although
he had spent his night screened by his Lord (none knew
anything about such sins). In the morning he removes
Allah's screen from himself." (Bukhari)
Al Faahishah comprises each improper and indecent act.
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
